name: Tortellini with Walnut Pesto
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Cheese and spinach-filled pasta (tortellini, ravioli or agnolotti)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta in boiling water until al dente. Drain and set aside.
2. Prepare the sauce by grinding walnuts, garlic, and cheese in a food processor until well blended.
3. Heat the cream in a saucepan. Add it to the walnut mixture and combine. Cook for 1 1/2 minutes.
4. Add the pasta to the sauce and toss with the sauce. Serve garnished with sun-dried tomatoes.
